dict.string: Clawbridge reads your calendar events to power scheduled automations (daily briefing, office-day detection, freeagent booking).
Clawbridge reads your calendar events to power scheduled automations (daily briefing, office-day detection, freeagent booking).
Clawbridge reads and creates Reminders so scheduled automations (and Vonk via Telegram) can surface and add tasks.
Clawbridge reads and creates Reminders so scheduled automations (and Vonk via Telegram) can surface and add tasks.
Clawbridge controls Mail.app via AppleScript to read inbox messages and send mail on behalf of automations.
